CREATE TABLE sales (id INT, revenue FLOAT, expense FLOAT);
SELECT regr_r2(revenue, expense) FROM sales;
CREATE TABLE performance (employee_id INT, sales FLOAT, targets FLOAT);
SELECT regr_r2(sales, targets) FROM performance;
CREATE TABLE nested_data (a FLOAT, b FLOAT);
INSERT INTO nested_data VALUES (3.0, 4.0), (5.0, 6.0), (7.0, 8.0);
SELECT regr_r2(a, (SELECT AVG(b) FROM nested_data)) FROM nested_data;
CREATE TABLE details (category VARCHAR, amount FLOAT);
SELECT regr_r2(AVG(amount), category) FROM details GROUP BY category;
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT, customer_id INT, total FLOAT);
SELECT regr_r2(AVG(total), customer_id) FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id;
CREATE TABLE test_data (x FLOAT, y FLOAT);
SELECT regr_r2((SELECT SUM(y) FROM test_data), (SELECT SUM(x) FROM test_data)) FROM test_data;
CREATE TABLE complex_data (data1 FLOAT, data2 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO complex_data VALUES (1.0, 3.0), (2.0, 4.0), (3.0, 3.5);
SELECT regr_r2(data1, data2) FROM (SELECT data1, data2 FROM complex_data WHERE data1 > 1.5) AS filtered;
